Also since this game got taken down and you can’t play with people I found this game called shadow tags with working severs and is the exact same thing as this game with the sme menu just not in the fall update with the same menu so go get!  This was my first out of a lot of other gorilla tag fan games with mods and it’s been a while and it’s still my favorite one the mod menu is insane and I love the liv camera mod I love just messing with mods and stuff and if you wanna do that to without getting banned this game is perfect it’s just so fun and I can’t stop playing it if you don’t check this game out just know you missing out on a lot!

reviews.review_description: You took out the best mods and swapped them with broken ones,you ruined your game at least update it

It’s a great game but it has gotten terminated/banned from the meta store so it’s no longer available. I remember I could join easily like it was yesterday but it was copyright because they copied maps. So that is why it says no players online and you can’t connect to a room/code. Hope this inflicted on how you see the game and there is another modded game called project apex. You should download it it’s not a promo but it’s like project shadows. I hope this helped you.

It's probably the best fan-game I've played! I love all the mods and in the two hours I've played, I've noticed that it's less toxic than the real gorilla tag! My friend suggested a mod called "Auto Lucio Run", so can you add it?
